records.note: The exact GZ2P01 input scan seals the executable and every selected Msgde/Msguk/Msgsp/Msgfr/Msgit archive.
The GameCube PAL source branch maps language values to the five numbered message archive directories; this structural profile intentionally supplies no handler backing semantics.
The GameCube PAL source branch reads OSGetLanguage for runtime selection; exact handler/backing promotion remains separate.
